stonetop.summary: A Marshedge guide who knows the Fen's hidden hazards and grim secrets.

system.concept: A @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge} guide who knows the Fen's hidden hazards and grim secrets.
system.description: The fen-walkers are @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge} folk who know @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.UstvXnD6EA9IBBO3]{Ferrier's Fen} as well as anyone can — its hidden hazards, its grim secrets, and the safe paths through the muck. Hire one before venturing in. Notable fen-walkers include Alastar (exceptional, old, devious; feels no remorse; demands payment in hand), Fiadh (curious, kind, fen-blighted; hides his affliction; trades for secrets of the Fen), and Riona (prepared, agile, stubborn; assumes the worst; wants competence shown).
